# Build in El Salvador (BIES)

> Build in El Salvador (BIES) is a decentralized, AI-powered, Bitcoin-native network that connects entrepreneurs and builders to the right people, resources, and capital to move their vision forward in El Salvador.

## About
Build in El Salvador, known as BIES, is a network and coordination layer for entrepreneurs and builders who are serious about decentralization, Bitcoin, and regenerative living. Founded by Michael Ruiz in 2023, BIES began as informal gatherings of entrepreneurs and grew into a network of builders, investors, vendors, peers, and government officials coordinating on projects that contribute to the growth and revitalization of El Salvador. BIES spotlights the entrepreneurs, investors, and visionaries turning El Salvador into a hub of innovation, freedom, and opportunity, and connects them so relationships form, projects come to life, people get hired, and projects get funded.

## What members get
- Events: workshops, roundtables, and retreats hosted in small group settings under the Chatham House Rule.
- BIES-Certified Vendor Network: vetted, trustworthy vendors with a history of proof of work in the ecosystem.
- BIES Project Directory: post or browse active projects to find partners, investors, and teammates.
- Private Nostr Network: the digital HQ where builders connect, collaborate, and interact economically.
- Co-Work Hotel: a physical home base to work and connect in person in El Salvador.
- Builder Spotlight Newsletter: stories of the builders, projects, and journeys across El Salvador (hundreds of subscribers).

## Core values
1. We empower individual agency.
2. We collaborate towards a more prosperous future.
3. We build on transparent, open, honest foundations (Bitcoin-native).
4. We leverage technology that liberates and uplifts our humanity (including AI).
5. We embrace a regenerative way of living.

## Facts
- Name: Build in El Salvador (BIES)
- Founder: Michael Ruiz
- Founded: 2023
- Location: El Salvador
- Community members: 100+
- Events held: 50+
- Capital invested: $100,000+
- Newsletter: Builder Spotlight on Substack (hundreds of subscribers)
- Consultancy: 1:1 calls on doing business, investing, or building in El Salvador, $100 USD/hour (Zoom or WhatsApp)
- Contact: info@buildinelsalvador.com
- Focus: entrepreneurship, Bitcoin, decentralization, regenerative living, community building
